local_evidence: dev.md-backed OSSX_LIVE_INTEGRATION=1 GOWORK=off go test -tags integration ./adapters/aliyun -count=1 -timeout 180s

boundary job runs xlibgate trust gates

downstream adoption and production soak evidence are not archived
